title: Thermal: More Integral Components
description: Adds More OP Integral Components to Thermal Series
body: ## **Adds (Very) Over Powered Integral Components.** ## ⚙️ Details: Adds Nine new integral components to thermal series.(Now with recipes!) Including 15x, 20x, 25x, 30x, 35x, 40x, 45x, 50x, and 100x Integral Components These Components make your machines function faster just like the ones in the base Thermal Series. ## ❓ Why: Useful For Modpack Creators. My recipes might be unbalanced in a modpack so I recomend you change them. May be useful if Thermal Series is a core part of your modpack and you don't mind something over powered! ### If anyone wants to improve the (bad) art Feel free to open an issue ### 🐛 Any suggestions or issues - Github Issues
